title: Kiln VISION v3 frontmatter (P4)
description: The YAML frontmatter of .kiln/docs/VISION.md — the authoritative machine surface of the compiled vision. Documentation contract only: the runtime enforcer is validateVisionFrontmatter in scripts/kiln-vision.mjs, a hand-rolled field-for-field mirror (no ajv, no deps), which additionally enforces what a JSON schema cannot express: (1) each counts.* equals the number of body lines matching that family's line grammar (- **FR-N**: etc.); (2) counts.unresolved_clarifications equals the body's [NEEDS CLARIFICATION count, and status gated|approved demands zero; (3) the frontmatter open_questions id set equals the body's Open Questions section id set; (4) visual_direction false ⇔ the Visual Direction section body is exactly the decline line, true ⇔ substantive; (5) every ## section title present exactly once. The frontmatter's structured values (session, counts, open_questions) are written as single-key JSON — `key: {…}`/`key: […]`, JSON.parse-able after the first colon, wrappable until the next top-level key — the zero-dep subset the parser reads.

status.description: draft = markers legal; gated|approved demand zero unresolved clarifications (the T1 gate rule)

tier.description: the brainstorm depth tier; express = the near-headless intake lane

visual_direction.description: authoritative: false ⇔ the Visual Direction section is exactly the decline line; the conductor threads this from vision.js's return into architecture's visualDirection arg (the mechanical path)

ideas.description: ledger-sourced provenance (the ideas live in brainstorm-ledger.jsonl, not the body) — type-checked only, never cross-checked

counts.description: each cross-checked against the body's line-grammar count — a lying count is a broken artifact

open_questions.description: the authoritative OQ list (research parses priority/timing from HERE; the body section is the human-readable mirror — id sets must match)
